basic_info.title: Final Fantasy X
basic_info.review: IGN praised the game for its emotional story, stunning visuals, and the innovative Sphere Grid system, calling it a masterpiece of the genre.

alternative_names: ファイナルファンタジーX

play_today.details: The HD Remaster on PC with ProjectUnX mod provides the most complete experience. Includes all International version content, widescreen support, controller button prompts, and quality-of-life improvements.

recommended_patches.name: ProjectUnX (Untitled Project X)
recommended_patches.description: Comprehensive mod including 4GB memory patch, widescreen support, controller button prompts, speed boosters, and various technical fixes. Essential for optimal PC experience.

recommended_patches.name: Special K Mod
recommended_patches.description: Additional tweaks and enhancements that work alongside ProjectUnX for improved performance and visual quality.

recommended_patches.name: 4GB Memory Patch
recommended_patches.description: Fixes random crashes during cutscenes by allowing the game to use more system memory. Included in ProjectUnX but available separately if needed.

play_today.details: The original International version on PS2 offers the authentic experience with better character expressions and models than the HD Remaster. Can be played via emulator with widescreen patches.

recommended_patches.name: Widescreen Patch
recommended_patches.description: Enables 16:9 aspect ratio support for PS2 version. Available through PCSX2 patches or community mods.

optimal_settings: Use GSdx plugin with hardware mode
Enable EE x2, VU x4 speed hacks for performance

play_today.details: Console versions of the HD Remaster with cross-save functionality. Good for playing on TV or portable without PC setup.
Portable HD Remaster version with touch controls. Convenient for on-the-go play but lacks PC modding capabilities.

The definitive modern experience via Steam. Runs at native 4K with unlocked frame rates, supports widescreen, and includes all HD Remaster content like voice acting and the Fiend Arena. Crucially, it supports community mods that fix the controversial HD textures, restore original PS2 visuals, and add QoL features like auto-save and difficulty adjustments.

recommended_patches.name: Special K UnX (Untitled Project X)
recommended_patches.description: A comprehensive mod for the Windows HD Remaster that fixes green screen glitches, enables cutscene skipping, adds variable speed control (up to 16x), and restores original PS2 character face models.

recommended_patches.name: FFX/X-2 HD Remaster - Anima Edition
recommended_patches.description: A PCGamingWiki recommended patch that fixes the 4GB memory limit, resolves online-only bugs, and improves stability for the Windows version.

recommended_patches.name: FFX/X-2 Re-Remastered Mod
recommended_patches.description: A high-resolution texture pack that manually upscales all textures, animations, and interface elements using AI to improve visual fidelity on the Windows HD Remaster.

recommended_patches.name: FFX HD - Ultra Remaster
recommended_patches.description: A popular texture replacement mod for the Windows version that replaces low-resolution assets with high-quality alternatives, requiring the External File Loader.

play_today.details: The most convenient console option for modern players. Offers native 1080p/4K output, quick resume, and cloud saves. Includes the complete HD Remaster content with voice acting and the Fiend Arena. While it lacks the modding capabilities of PC, it provides a stable, plug-and-play experience with modern controller support and no emulation required.

The authentic original experience for purists. The Japanese 'International' version (released Jan 2002) is the only PS2 version with full English voice acting and the Fiend Arena. It features the original 4:3 aspect ratio and 240p resolution, offering the truest representation of the game's design, though it lacks modern QoL features like save states or widescreen support.

optimal_settings: Internal Resolution: 2x Native (720p) or 3x Native (1080p) for sharp visuals
Texture Filtering: Bilinear for smoother sprite scaling
Frame Limiting: Off to utilize the game's native 60fps
Enable NTSC mode for correct color timing and aspect ratio
Renderer: Vulkan for best performance on modern Android devices
Internal Resolution: 2x Native for balanced performance and clarity
Disable Frame Skipping to ensure smooth gameplay

description.synopsis: Tidus, a star blitzball player, is summoned to the fantasy world of Spira by a mysterious girl named Yuna. Together, they embark on a pilgrimage to defeat Sin, a colossal beast that terrorizes the world, while uncovering a dark secret about the cycle of rebirth and the true nature of the gods.
key_features: Overworld exploration on foot and by airship
Non-linear story progression via Sphere Grid
legacy_and_impact: Final Fantasy X is widely regarded as one of the greatest RPGs of all time, credited with popularizing full voice acting and FMV cutscenes in the genre. Its emotional narrative and the Sphere Grid system influenced countless subsequent RPGs, setting a new standard for character progression and storytelling.
